markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between DiffBlue and GrowthX Labs/growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DiffBlue seeks to improve topical authority and organic traffic (currently \~5K visitors) for Java testing/unit testing](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-assisted content creation with human expertise, emphasizing quality over pure AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Proposed 90-day pilot program focusing on editorial content (25 articles/month) with potential for link building](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs can start working with DiffBlue from April 21st due to current demand](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Topics

### DiffBlue Background and Challenges

  - [6-year-old AI company focused on software development lifecycle testing](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Uses reinforcement learning for deterministic results, unlike LLM-based solutions](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Enterprise-heavy customer base in telco, finance, defense, aerospace](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Lacking topical authority in Java testing and unit testing](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Small organic traffic (\~5K visitors) despite valuable insights and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### GrowthX Labs Approach

  - [AI-assisted content creation with three layers of human expertise: writers, editors, and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [250-step workflow for each piece of content, combining LLM capabilities with human insight](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Focus on high-quality, factually accurate content optimized for both traditional search and AI-based search](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Includes technical SEO support (site speed, indexing, redirects)](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Successful case studies with clients like Strapi, showing significant traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Content Strategy and Collaboration

  - [GrowthX Labs creates data-driven content calendars (e.g., 2,500 potential pieces for some clients)](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Weekly/bi-weekly collaboration with client teams for content ideation and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Flexible approach to incorporate client expertise and adapt to changing priorities](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### Pricing and Packages

  - [Two main packages: Content (25 articles/month) and Programmatic (100 pages/month)](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Programmatic package offers more surface area for testing different content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [90-day pilot program recommended for initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to provide a sample Statement of Work (SOW) for the editorial workstream](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to create a presentation for DiffBlue's CEO outlining the proposed partnership](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for ongoing communication between DiffBlue and GrowthX Labs teams](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [DiffBlue to review proposal and discuss internally with CEO](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Potential CEO-to-CEO call between DiffBlue and GrowthX Labs if needed for further clarification](https://fathom.video/share/2tJgeauNq2vz6CZYXeyJ1Dnpjx9BxVJY?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
